Routine.Name: Logic
Routine.Description: Returns current Local Date and Time to a Date/Time in/out parameter

Rung.Comment: ============================================================ T_Now: TIME -- RETURN CURRENT DATE / TIME ============================================================ Revision 1.0-Example: 2008-Jul-02, DER Release for V17 CD as Date/Time Examples ============================================================ Returns the current local Date and Time from the controller clock as a DateTime (Yr : DINT, Mo : DINT, Da : DINT, Hr : DINT, Min : DINT, Sec : DINT, uSec : DINT) ============================================================ POWERUP / INVALID STATE HANDLING ============================================================ This object returns the date and time every scan when enabled. No powerup or invalid state handling is necessary. ============================================================ GET CURRENT LOCAL TIME ============================================================ Use a GSV (Get System Value) to get the current local clock time.

Return the date and time values in the In/Out (reference) DateTime Tag.
(NOTE: You can type <ALT>- 0 (zero) or click the icon on the toolbar to close the Controller Organizer tree if you would like a wider view of this rung.)
